title: Safe local live claim-extraction probe CLI
problem: Ticket-058 proved local Ollama readiness and ticket-059 audit found live structured tasks wired but no fail-closed operator CLI. extract-claims persists to the default SQLite path and is easy to mis-run. Operators need a report-only live probe outside CI.
acceptance_criteria: Command fails closed when Ollama unreachable or model unavailable.
Live claim extraction on fixture chunk validates via Python; report written to data/reports/live_probes/.
No write to default SQLite DB; no public export.
Unit tests mock-only; live_smoke structured test excluded from default pytest.
test_plan: Manual: RGE_LLM_MODE=ollama RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_LLM=1 python -m rge.cli probe-extract-claims
non_goals: Do not implement OpenAI or OpenRouter.
Do not persist to default DB or public exports.
Do not run live probe in CI/golden.
Do not implement full live research orchestration.
rollback_plan: Remove probe subcommand and live_probe module; revert docs and smoke extension.
